contracts.createFirstContract: Create your first contract using the button above.
contracts.customContractHint: Enter your individual contract text here. You can use the editor to format the text.
contracts.documentPasswordProtected: This document is password protected. Please enter the password.
contracts.drawSignature: Draw your signature in the field
contracts.drawSignatureInField: Draw your signature in the field
contracts.hintAcceptanceProcedure: Describe how the software acceptance is conducted
contracts.hintApiAccess: Whether the licensee may use the software API for integrations
contracts.hintAsIsClause: Software is sold 'as is'. Only effective for B2B
contracts.hintAuditRight: Licensor may audit contractual usage once per year
contracts.hintAutoRenewal: Contract renews automatically if not terminated in time
contracts.hintBackupRights: Whether the licensee may create backup copies of the software
contracts.hintBillingCycle: Billing cycle for the SaaS service
contracts.hintCisgExclusion: Excludes the UN Convention on Contracts (CISG). Standard for software contracts
contracts.hintClientCountry: Client's country. Relevant for VAT ID and reverse charge
contracts.hintClientData: Your client/contracting party data. Select an existing client or enter data manually
contracts.hintClientVatId: Your client's VAT identification number. Important for B2B contracts within the EU
contracts.hintCodeDelivery: How the source code is delivered
contracts.hintConfidentialityPeriod: How long the confidentiality obligation applies. Typical: 2-5 years
contracts.hintContractTitle: e.g. Software license agreement for XY
contracts.hintContractType: Choose the appropriate contract type. Each type contains specific clauses
contracts.hintCustomerType: B2B = business customer, B2C = consumer. For B2C, consumer protection clauses are activated
contracts.hintDataLocation: Where customer data is stored. Important for GDPR compliance
contracts.hintDeliverables: Delivery of API docs, installation guide and architecture overview as part of the project
contracts.hintDocumentation: API docs, architecture overview, setup guide are included
contracts.hintEndDate: Leave empty for unlimited contracts, otherwise enter a fixed end date
contracts.hintExclusiveRights: Exclusive: All rights are fully transferred to the buyer
contracts.hintGdprClause: Enables GDPR clause in the contract when the software processes personal data
contracts.hintGoverningLaw: Under which national law the contract is interpreted
contracts.hintHostingLocation: Where the software is hosted. Affects contract clauses
contracts.hintHourlyRate: Net hourly rate in EUR for software development
contracts.hintJurisdiction: Which court has jurisdiction for disputes. Only effective for B2B
contracts.hintLanguage: The language determines in which language the contract is generated
contracts.hintLiabilityFactor: Factor × contract value as maximum liability (e.g. 1 = liability limited to contract value)
contracts.hintLicenseExclusivity: Simple = multiple licensing possible. Exclusive = only this licensee
contracts.hintLicenseModel: Perpetual = permanent. Subscription = time-limited. Named/User = per user
contracts.hintMaxUsers: Maximum number of concurrent users allowed to use the software
contracts.hintMilestones: Define project phases with date and partial amount. Each milestone triggers a partial payment
contracts.hintMinTerm: Minimum contract term before ordinary termination is possible
contracts.hintModificationRights: Whether the licensee may modify the source code
contracts.hintNdaClause: Adds an additional NDA clause to the contract
contracts.hintNdaType: Mutual = both parties. Unilateral = only one party
contracts.hintOssCompliance: Does the code contain open source libraries? Adds OSS compliance clause
contracts.hintOssComplianceLicense: Adds OSS compliance clause. Enable if the software contains open source components
contracts.hintPaymentDeadline: Within which period the invoice must be paid after receipt
contracts.hintPaymentType: One-time = single payment. Monthly/quarterly/yearly = recurring payments
contracts.hintPenaltyClause: Optional contractual penalty for breach of confidentiality
contracts.hintPricingModel: Fixed price = total amount fixed. Hourly = billing by effort
contracts.hintProjectDescription: Detailed description of the project to be developed and technical requirements
contracts.hintSaasDescription: Description of the SaaS service and included features
contracts.hintSellerWarranty: Period during which the seller is liable for defects
contracts.hintSenderData: Your data as contracting party A. Loaded from your settings
contracts.hintSenderVatId: VAT identification number (e.g. DE123456789). Important for B2B contracts within the EU
contracts.hintSetupSupport: Support for setup and commissioning after handover
contracts.hintSlaCredits: If SLA availability is not met, the customer receives credits
contracts.hintSlaUptime: Guaranteed availability in percent per year (99.9% = max. 8.76h downtime/year)
contracts.hintSoftwareName: Name and version of the software covered by the maintenance contract
contracts.hintSourceCodeAccess: Whether the licensee gets access to the source code
contracts.hintSourceCodeScope: e.g. Complete codebase incl. frontend, backend, database migrations
contracts.hintSupport247: 24/7 support for critical system failures (total outage, data loss)
contracts.hintSupportLevel: No support (none), Basic (email), Premium (email + phone with response times)
contracts.hintTemplate: Choose a saved template as a base or start with a blank contract
contracts.hintTerminationType: Ordinary = with notice at end of period. Extraordinary = only for good cause
contracts.hintTransferMethod: Transfer: Repository is transferred to buyer. Goodwill clause: seller support after handover
contracts.hintWarrantyPeriod: General warranty period. For B2C, automatically set to legal minimum
contracts.hintWarrantyRepair: Period after acceptance during which defects are fixed free of charge
contracts.hintWithdrawalNotice: Withdrawal notice: 14 days according to distance selling regulations
contracts.legalNotice: By clicking "Sign contract" you confirm that you have read and agree to the contract.
contracts.noteAsIsClause: Note: As-is clause is not effective in B2C contracts
contracts.noteB2cProtection: Note: B2C contracts automatically include withdrawal instructions and consumer protection clauses
contracts.noteGdprAutoClause: Note: GDPR/data protection clause is automatically inserted into the contract
contracts.noticePeriodHint: Number of days before end date by which notice must be given.
contracts.previewDisclaimer: This is a preview. The final PDF may differ slightly.
contracts.saveAsTemplateHint: Saves the contract text as a reusable template for future contracts.
contracts.shareDescription: The recipient can view the contract and sign directly online as a client.
contracts.signatureSuccessMessage: Thank you! Your signature has been saved successfully.
contracts.subtitle: Create, manage and sign contracts
contracts.title: Contracts

contractsModule.abWannDerVertragWirksamWird: Ab wann the Contract wirksam will be.
contractsModule.abrechnungszyklusFuerDenSaasdienst: Billing cycle for the SaaS service.
contractsModule.aktiviertDsgvoklauselImVertragWennDieSof: Enables GDPR clause in the contract when the software processes personal data .
contractsModule.allgemeineGewaehrleistungsfristBeiB2cWir: Allgema warrantysfrist. Bei B2C will be automatic on 24 months increased.
contractsModule.anzahlTageVorVertragsendeBisWannGekuendi: Anzahl days before contract end, until wann terminated will be must.
contractsModule.apiDocsIncluded: API docs, architecture overview, setup guide included
contractsModule.b2bGeschaeftskundeB2cPrivatkundeBeiB2cWe: B2B = business customer, B2C = privatee customer. Bei B2C will be automatic consumer protection clauses and cancellation policy inserted.
contractsModule.beiUnterschreitungDerSlaverfuegbarkeitEr: Bei Unterschreitung the SLA availability erhält the Customer proportional credits.
contractsModule.beschreibeWieDieAbnahmeDerSoftwareErfolg: Beschreibe, how the Abnahme the Software erfolgt (z.B. Testphase, Abnahmeprotokoll).
contractsModule.beschreibungDesSaasdienstesUndDerEnthalt: Description the SaaS-Servicees and the enthaltenen Funktionen.
contractsModule.contractsobderlizenznehmersicherungskopi: Whether the licensee may create backup copies of the software.
contractsModule.contractswaehleeinegespeichertevorlageal: Choose a saved template as a basis or start from scratch.
contractsModule.customerData: Your customer/contract partner data. Select an existing contact.
contractsModule.customerVatId: VAT ID of your customer. Important for B2B contracts within the EU.
contractsModule.definiereProjektphasenMitDatumUndTeilbet: Definiere Projectphasen with Date and Teilbetrag. Jeder Meilenstein will be separat abgerechnet.
contractsModule.deliveryOfDocs: Delivery of API docs, installation guide and architecture overview
contractsModule.detaillierteBeschreibungDesZuEntwickelnd: Detaillierte Description the zu entwickelnden Projects and the Anforderungen.
contractsModule.dieSpracheBestimmtInWelcherSpracheDer: Die Language bestimmt, in welcher Language the Contractstext generated will be.
contractsModule.diesIstEineVorschauDasEndgueltigePdf: Dies is a preview. Das endgültige PDF can leicht abweichen.
contractsModule.diesesDokumentIstPasswortgeschuetztBitte: Dieses Dokument ist passwortgeschützt. Bitte geben Sie das Passwort ein.
contractsModule.einfachMehrfachvergabeMoeglichExklusivNu: Einfach = Mehrfachvergabe possible. Exklusiv = Nur thisr Lizenznehmer may the Software nutzen.
contractsModule.einmaligEineZahlungMonatlichquartalsweis: Einmalig = a Zahlung. Monthlich/Quartalsweise/Jährlich = wiederkehrende Zahlungen.
contractsModule.enterContractText: Enter your individual contract text here.
contractsModule.enthaeltDerCodeOpensourcebibliothekenFue: Enthält the Code Open-Source-Bibliotheken? Fügt OSS-Compliance-Klausel a.
contractsModule.erstellenSieIhrenErstenVertragMitDem: Create Sie Ihren ersten Vertrag mit dem Button oben.
contractsModule.exklusivAlleRechteGehenVollstaendigAufDe: Exklusiv = all Rights gehen vollständig on the Käufer about. Nicht-exklusiv = Verkäufer behält usage rightse.
contractsModule.faktorVertragswertAlsMaximaleHaftungZb1: Faktor × contract value as maximale Haftung. z.B. 1 = Haftung max. contract value. 2 = doppelter contract value. Mindestens 5.000 EUR.
contractsModule.festpreisGesamtbetragFixStundenbasisAbre: Festpreis = Gesamtbetrag fix. hoursbasis = Abrechnung after Aufwand. Meilensta = Zahlung after Abschluss einzelner Phasen.
contractsModule.fuegtEineZusaetzlicheNdaklauselInDenVert: Fügt a zusätzliche NDA-Klausel in the Contract a.
contractsModule.fuegtOsscomplianceklauselEinAktivierenWe: Fügt OSS-Compliance-Klausel a. Enablen when the Software Open-Source-Bibliotheken enthält.
contractsModule.garantierteVerfuegbarkeitInProzentProJah: Garantierte Verfügbarkeit in Prozent pro Year. 99,9% = max. 8,76h Ausfall/Year.
contractsModule.gegenseitigBeideParteienEinseitigNurEine: Gegensinceig = beide Parteien. Einsinceig = only a Partei openbart confidential Informationen.
contractsModule.hinweisAsisklauselIstBeiB2cvertraegenNic: Note: As-Is-Klausel is at B2C-Contractsn not wirksam and will be in generateden Contract ignoriert.
contractsModule.hinweisB2cvertraegeEnthaltenAutomatischW: Note: B2C-Contracts enthalten automatic cancellation policy and consumer protection clauses.
contractsModule.hinweisDsgvodatenschutzklauselWirdAutoma: Note: DSGVO-Dataschutzklausel will be automatic in the Contract inserted.
contractsModule.innerhalbWelcherFristDieRechnungNachZuga: Innerhalb welcher Deadline the Invoice after Zugang zu zahlen is.
contractsModule.landDesKundenRelevantFuerUstidnrReversec: Land the Customern. Relevant for USt-IdNr., Reverse-Charge and anwendbares Right.
contractsModule.leerLassenFuerUnbefristeteVertraegeAnson: Leer lassen for unbefristete Contracts. Ansonsten festes Enddatum.
contractsModule.lizenzgeberDarfEinmalJaehrlichDieVertrag: Lizenzgeber may einmal jährlich the vertragsgemäße Nutzung prüfen.
contractsModule.maximaleAnzahlGleichzeitigerNutzerDieDie: Maximale Anzahl gleichzeitiger Nutzer, the Software verwenden may.
contractsModule.mindestvertragslaufzeitBevorEineOrdentli: Mindestvertragslaufzeit, bevor a ordentliche Kündigung possible is. 0 = no Mindestlaufzeit.
contractsModule.nachWelchemLandesrechtDerVertragAusgeleg: Nach welchem Landesrecht the Contract ausgelegt will be.
contractsModule.nameUndVersionDerSoftwareFuerDie: Name and Version the Software, for the maintenance contract gilt.
contractsModule.nettostundensatzInEurFuerDieSoftwareentw: Netto-hourly rate in EUR for the software development.
contractsModule.noSupportOptions: No Support = none. Basic = Email. Premium = Email + Phone. Enterprise = 24/7 with SLA.
contractsModule.obDerLizenznehmerDenQuellcodeVeraendernD: Ob the Lizenznehmer the source code verändern may.
contractsModule.obDerLizenznehmerDieSoftwareapiFuerInteg: Ob the Lizenznehmer the Software-API for Integrationen nutzen may.
contractsModule.obDerLizenznehmerSicherungskopienDerSoft: Ob the Lizenznehmer Sicherungskopien the Software createn may (§ 69d Abs. 2 UrhG).
contractsModule.obDerLizenznehmerZugriffAufDenQuellcode: Ob the Lizenznehmer Zugriff on the source code erhält.
contractsModule.optionaleKonventionalstrafeBeiVerstossGe: Optional e Konventionalstrafe bei Verstoß gegen die Geheimhaltung.
contractsModule.ordentlichFristgerechtZumPeriodenendeAus: Ordentlich = fristgerecht to Periodenende. Außerordentlich = only from wichtigem Grund (§ 314 BGB). Beides = beide Options in Contract.
contractsModule.perpetualDauerhaftAboZeitlichBegrenztNam: Perpetual = dauerhaft. Abo = zeitlich begrenzt. Named-User = pro User. Concurrent = gleichzeitige Nutzer. Stanthere = Stantherelizenz.
contractsModule.schliesstDasUnkaufrechtCisgAusStandardBe: Schließt the UN-Kaufrecht (CISG) from. Standard at Software-Contractsn, da CISG for Warenhandel konzipiert is.
contractsModule.softwareWirdWieBesehenVerkauftNurBei: Software will be "how besehen" verkauft. NUR at B2B possible. Bei B2C not wirksam.
contractsModule.speichertDenVertragstextAlsWiederverwend: Storage t den Vertragstext als wiederverwendbare Vorlage. Beim nächsten Individualvertrag kannst du diese Vorlage auswählen.
contractsModule.subtitle: Manage your contracts
contractsModule.title: Contracts
contractsModule.transferRepositoryWirdAufKaeuferUebertra: Transfer = Repository will be on Käufer abouttragen. Goodwill = Zugang bleibt bestehen as Kulanz. Contractlich = Zugang is vertraglich garantiert.
contractsModule.umsatzsteueridentifikationsnummerZbDe123: Umsatzsteuer-Identifikationsnummer, z.B. DE123456789. Wichtig for B2B-Contracts innerhalb the EU.
contractsModule.unterstuetzungBeimAufsetzenUndInbetriebn: Unterstützung when Aufsetzen and Inbetriebnahme after Übergabe.
contractsModule.vertragVerlaengertSichAutomatischWennNic: Contract extended sich automatic, when not rechtzeitig terminated will be.
contractsModule.vielenDankIhreUnterschriftWurdeErfolgrei: Thank you! Your signature was successfully saved.
contractsModule.waehleDenPassendenVertragstypJederTypEnt: Select the passenden contract type. Jeder Type enthält vorgefertigte Klauseln for the jebecauseigen Anwendungsfall.
contractsModule.waehleEineGespeicherteVorlageAlsBasisOde: Select a savede Template as Basis or start with leerem Text.
contractsModule.welchesGerichtBeiStreitigkeitenZustaendi: Welches Gericht at Streitigkeiten zuständig is. Nur at B2B frei wählbar.
contractsModule.wieDerQuellcodeUebergebenWird: How the source code aboutgeben will be.
contractsModule.wieLangeDieGeheimhaltungspflichtGiltUebl: How lange the non-disclosurespflicht gilt. Üblich: 2-5 years.
contractsModule.woDieKundendatenGespeichertWerdenWichtig: Where the Customerndaten saved will be. Wichtig for DSGVO-Konformität.
contractsModule.woDieSoftwareBetriebenWirdBeeinflusstVer: Where the software will be operated. Affects contract clauses for data storage and access.
contractsModule.yourDataAsPartyA: Your data as contracting party A. Loaded from settings.
contractsModule.zbGesamteCodebasisInklFrontendBackendDat: z.B. Gesamte Codebasis inkl. Frontend, Backend, database-Migrationen...
contractsModule.zeichnenSieIhreUnterschriftInDasFeld: Zeichnen You Ihre signature in the Field unten. You koennen also the Touchscreen verwenden.
contractsModule.zeichnenSieIhreUnterschriftInDasFeld1: Zeichnen Sie Ihre Unterschrift in das Feld unten. Sie können auch den Touchscreen verwenden.
contractsModule.zeitraumInDemDerVerkaeuferFuerMaengel: Timeraum, in the Verkäufer for Mängel in source code haftet. Standard at Kauf: 6 months.
contractsModule.zeitraumNachAbnahmeInDemMaengelKostenlos: Timeraum after Abnahme, in the Mängel kostenlos behoben will be. Standard: 12 months.
